name: word-counter
description: Word count goals, sprint tracking, and writing productivity visualization. Set daily, weekly, and project-level targets. Run writing sprints. Track your output over time. Build momentum.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: words:goal
commands.description: Set a word count goal (daily, weekly, monthly, or project)

commands.name: words:log
commands.description: Log words written in a session

commands.name: words:today
commands.description: Show today's word count and progress toward daily goal

commands.name: words:week
commands.description: Show this week's word count and progress toward weekly goal

commands.name: words:project
commands.description: Show project-level word count and progress toward manuscript goal

commands.name: words:sprint:end
commands.description: End the current sprint and log word count

commands.name: words:streak
commands.description: Show current writing streak (consecutive days with words logged)

commands.name: words:history
commands.description: Show word count history for a time period

commands.name: words:best
commands.description: Show personal best word counts (best day, best week, best sprint)

celebrationMessages.25: A quarter of the way there. Keep going.
celebrationMessages.50: Halfway. You're in the flow now.
celebrationMessages.100: Goal reached. You showed up and did the work.
